elephants.] [Adding these numbers together gives us the total.] [12 plus 24 equals 36.] [36 plus 19 equals 55.] [Therefore, there are 55 elephants in total at the waterhole.] [The indigenous community member is surprised by the gathering.] [This event may indicate a change in the elephants' behavior.] [It could be due to a shortage of water in other areas.] [The waterhole is a vital resource for
